name: Female America Countryhumans
description:
Made this cause... Why not?

Art is on Pinterest, but apparently Wattpad drew it???

(The artist's name is on the artwork, and the colored text is clickable.)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

This one is a call back to my first ever public bot, America. And really, I just felt like making a female version ever since I was requested to make the America & USSR bot.

If you're straight, now you can fuck America as a boy. Or still make fun of her, I don't care.

Full image:

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

As always, feel free to leave reviews on this bot! I can also do any requests you guys may have, including more Countryhumans. Click here if you want to also request bots.
